tools.name: get_product_catalog
tools.description: Return the canonical B2B Italy product catalog and permanent safety boundaries. This tool is read-only and accepts no buyer data.

tools.name: check_buyer_fit
tools.description: Evaluate only coarse, non-personal eligibility facts. It does not create an order or validate an ACT entitlement.

tools.name: get_synthetic_example
tools.description: Return an approved synthetic preview at the correct DEC or ACT scale. No real company data is used.

tools.name: get_purchase_requirements
tools.description: Explain the machine-origin purchase prerequisites without accepting an order, returning checkout data or calling a provider.
